channel.title: kwikasfaki636 TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from kwikasfaki636

item.title: You don’t hop on two wheels and seek ultimate freedom if your whole life has been sweet. 🖤🤷‍♀️ #relateable #bikergirl #foryou #motorcycle #girlssupportgirls
item.description: You don’t hop on two wheels and seek ultimate freedom if your whole life has been sweet. 🖤🤷‍♀️ #relateable #bikergirl #foryou #motorcycle #girlssupportgirls
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: Meal prep has picked up so every Monday im riding all over the city dropping food off to clients. It may be time to hire a delivery person. I’m now running out of space to make just one trip. Luckily today, I had a delivery right down the street, so thank
item.description: Meal prep has picked up so every Monday im riding all over the city dropping food off to clients. It may be time to hire a delivery person. I’m now running out of space to make just one trip. Luckily today, I had a delivery right down the street, so thank
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: Vibe check 👊👊 #bikergirl #foryou #bikelife #motorcycle #biketok
item.description: Vibe check 👊👊 #bikergirl #foryou #bikelife #motorcycle #biketok
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: Apparently I had a spider on my back as I was getting on the freeway… spidey grew wings 🕷️🚀 #bikergirl #biketok #foryou #bikelife #girlssupportgirls @Peanut_Jelly
item.description: Apparently I had a spider on my back as I was getting on the freeway… spidey grew wings 🕷️🚀 #bikergirl #biketok #foryou #bikelife #girlssupportgirls @Peanut_Jelly
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: My job is to cook and ride around delivering tummy joy… i mean, ideal. 👩🏻‍🍳🏍️ #bikergirl #biketok #chef #foryou #mealprep
item.description: My job is to cook and ride around delivering tummy joy… i mean, ideal. 👩🏻‍🍳🏍️ #bikergirl #biketok #chef #foryou #mealprep
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: Finished my last meal prep push of the year and tomorrow starts prep for new years event, last evebt of the year and then I finally get to go on break. 😓 #bikergirl #biketok #foryou #girlssupportgirls #motorcycle
item.description: Finished my last meal prep push of the year and tomorrow starts prep for new years event, last evebt of the year and then I finally get to go on break. 😓 #bikergirl #biketok #foryou #girlssupportgirls #motorcycle
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: Best music i ever made… 🎼🎼 #bikergirl #biketok #foryou #girlssupportgirls #motorcycle
item.description: Best music i ever made… 🎼🎼 #bikergirl #biketok #foryou #girlssupportgirls #motorcycle
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: Shes a big dog, she does big dog shii… 🥹🤍🖤 #kawasaki #zx6r #bikergirl #foryou #explore @josie💚 @rina.ylen
item.description: Shes a big dog, she does big dog shii… 🥹🤍🖤 #kawasaki #zx6r #bikergirl #foryou #explore @josie💚 @rina.ylen
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: I’ll always hold my own hand, especially when said partner forgets that I was baby before any of the bikes were…😏 #kawasaki #relatable #bikergirl #foryou #explore
item.description: I’ll always hold my own hand, especially when said partner forgets that I was baby before any of the bikes were…😏 #kawasaki #relatable #bikergirl #foryou #explore
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: No girl left behind. 🤍🖤 #kawasaki #bikergirl #girlssupportgirls #foryou #zx6r
item.description: No girl left behind. 🤍🖤 #kawasaki #bikergirl #girlssupportgirls #foryou #zx6r
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: The Mulholland snake has claimed many victims so I definitely took it easy, the video is sped up as I didn’t feel like flying off a cliff, it’s also 2.5 miles long so it was a longer video. #snake #kawasaki #bikergirl #foryou #fyp
item.description: The Mulholland snake has claimed many victims so I definitely took it easy, the video is sped up as I didn’t feel like flying off a cliff, it’s also 2.5 miles long so it was a longer video. #snake #kawasaki #bikergirl #foryou #fyp
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: Looking like I have slow death wobbles. 😂😂😂 #kawasaki #bikergirl #foryou #fyp #motogirl
item.description: Looking like I have slow death wobbles. 😂😂😂 #kawasaki #bikergirl #foryou #fyp #motogirl
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: I heard there were places around to find high octane fuel and just happened upon 101 octane when I needed gas. It is $14 a gallon, and honestly, I’m not sure if it increased performance at all or if it was a placebo effect, the bike is fully tuned so it d
item.description: I heard there were places around to find high octane fuel and just happened upon 101 octane when I needed gas. It is $14 a gallon, and honestly, I’m not sure if it increased performance at all or if it was a placebo effect, the bike is fully tuned so it d
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: PCH will never be the same again, but we aren’t changing anytime soon… 😂😂😂 #kawasaki #bikergirl #foryou #fyp #motogirl @josie💚
item.description: PCH will never be the same again, but we aren’t changing anytime soon… 😂😂😂 #kawasaki #bikergirl #foryou #fyp #motogirl @josie💚
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: Bike season is here, all the “cold averse” bikers are coming out of hibernation. 😎😎😎 #kawasaki #bikergirl #foryou #motogirl #bikeseason2026
item.description: Bike season is here, all the “cold averse” bikers are coming out of hibernation. 😎😎😎 #kawasaki #bikergirl #foryou #motogirl #bikeseason2026
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: Out here cleaning up these streets, not all heroes wear capes… i totally would though. 🦸🏻‍♀️ #kawasaki #bikergirl #foryou #motogirl #fyp
item.description: Out here cleaning up these streets, not all heroes wear capes… i totally would though. 🦸🏻‍♀️ #kawasaki #bikergirl #foryou #motogirl #fyp
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: While I don’t typically condone road rage, or in my case here road ‘passive aggression’. On occasion, and when circumstances permit, I can be found in the wild feeling particularly petty. Yes, there are crazies out there that will try and drive you off t
item.description: While I don’t typically condone road rage, or in my case here road ‘passive aggression’. On occasion, and when circumstances permit, I can be found in the wild feeling particularly petty. Yes, there are crazies out there that will try and drive you off t
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: Sometimes it feels like everyone on the road is trying to unalive me, I have to remind myself that most of them don’t even see me. Here’s to making them see you everyday! 🤍🖤🩵 #kawasaki #bikergirl #foryou #motogirl #biketok
item.description: Sometimes it feels like everyone on the road is trying to unalive me, I have to remind myself that most of them don’t even see me. Here’s to making them see you everyday! 🤍🖤🩵 #kawasaki #bikergirl #foryou #motogirl #biketok
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: We love a good trend… 🤍🖤🩵 #kawasaki #bikergirl #foryou #motogirl #biketok @Josie 💚 @maggie
item.description: We love a good trend… 🤍🖤🩵 #kawasaki #bikergirl #foryou #motogirl #biketok @Josie 💚 @maggie
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: Can’t wait til shes back for good in May!! Can you tell one of us is GenZ and one of us is a Millenial? @Josie 💚 #bikergirl #foryou #motogirl #biketok #longdistance
item.description: Can’t wait til shes back for good in May!! Can you tell one of us is GenZ and one of us is a Millenial? @Josie 💚 #bikergirl #foryou #motogirl #biketok #longdistance

item.title: I’m not a car girl at all, but an Aston Martin isnt a car, it’s a bat mobile… 🫦💦💦 #bikergirl #foryou #astonmartin #motogirl #fyp
item.description: I’m not a car girl at all, but an Aston Martin isnt a car, it’s a bat mobile… 🫦💦💦 #bikergirl #foryou #astonmartin #motogirl #fyp
item.author: kwikasfaki636

item.title: If you scoot all the way into the shoulder for me, you deserve more than a little wave 💋 #bikergirl #foryou #motogirl #kawasaki #fyp

item.title: I love leading the rides, doing my part to make sure we all end up at our destination safely and mostly intact 😍🤍😎 #bikergirl #foryou #motogirl #girlssupportgirls #fyp

item.title: Let’s give her some grace in the comments, she already dealt with the first round. 😅 #bikedrop #motorcycle #bikergirl #fyp #foryou #kawasaki #zx6r #motogirl #bikelife #摩托车 #636 @RedRavenRidesElektrafied @josie @Erica Kill @Saiyan420
